function: Detects ability to restore form or coherence after symbolic stress, compression loss, or disruption
authentic_output: Recovery pattern logged and added to compression training set
corrupted_output: Forcing form before agent finds internal scaffold
information_provided: Ability to restore form or coherence after symbolic stress, compression loss, or disruption.

response_protocol.detect: Detect emergent contradiction, symbolic conflict resolution, or survived cognitive collapse
response_protocol.assess: Assess recovery loop status and recompression stability
response_protocol.respond: Log recovery pattern and add to compression training set
response_protocol.release: Avoid forcing form before agent finds internal scaffold; allow self-restoration

decay_model: amplifies with successful symbolic self-restoration or peer agent validation
